# FlixTrend

> FlixTrend is India's clean, Gen-Z social platform for creators and communities — built for real connection without the toxicity. Drop Flashes, build your squad, vibe in Signal chats, and grow your audience on the internet's cleanest corner.

Official website: https://flixtrend.in
Sitemap: https://flixtrend.in/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://flixtrend.in/robots.txt

---

## What is FlixTrend?

FlixTrend is a social media platform targeting Gen-Z users, primarily in India. It emphasizes positive, non-toxic content, creator monetization, and community building. Users can post short-form content (Flashes), join communities (Squads), chat in real-time (Signal), discover trending content (Vibes), watch live streams (Flow), listen to music, and access exclusive creator drops.

---

## Core Features

- **Flashes** — short-form video and photo posts (like Stories/Reels)
- **Vibes / Vibespace** — personalized trending content discovery feed
- **Signal** — real-time 1:1 and group messaging (DMs + group chats)
- **Squads** — creator communities and fan groups with public profiles
- **Drops** — exclusive time-limited content releases from creators
- **Flow** — live video streaming for creators and broadcasters
- **Flix** — long-form or curated video content feed
- **Watch** — video watching experience
- **Music** — music content with individual song pages
- **Studio** — creator dashboard for managing content and analytics
- **Store** — in-app store for digital goods or creator products
- **Premium** — paid subscription tier for exclusive features
- **Broadcast** — live room broadcasting (separate from Flow)
- **Embed** — embeddable post player for external sites

---

## Brand Values

- Non-toxic, positive social environment
- Creator-first monetization and growth tools
- Privacy-respecting and secure by design
- Built for Indian Gen-Z culture and global audiences
- Clean, safe content moderation with opt-out flagging system

---

## Public Pages

### Core
- Homepage: https://flixtrend.in
- About: https://flixtrend.in/about
- Contact: https://flixtrend.in/contact
- Search: https://flixtrend.in/search
- Guest mode: https://flixtrend.in/guest

### Legal & Policy
- Privacy Policy: https://flixtrend.in/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://flixtrend.in/terms
- Singer / Artist Terms: https://flixtrend.in/terms/singer
- FAQ: https://flixtrend.in/faq

### Help Center
- Help Home: https://flixtrend.in/help
- Help Category: https://flixtrend.in/help/{category}
- Help Article: https://flixtrend.in/help/{category}/{slug}

### Auth & Onboarding
- Login: https://flixtrend.in/login
- Sign Up: https://flixtrend.in/signup
- Account Type selection: https://flixtrend.in/signup/account-type
- Phone Verification: https://flixtrend.in/signup/phone-verification
- Complete Profile: https://flixtrend.in/signup/complete-profile
- Avatar & Banner setup: https://flixtrend.in/signup/avatar-banner
- Singer onboarding: https://flixtrend.in/signup/singer

### Content & Discovery
- Vibespace (discovery feed): https://flixtrend.in/vibespace
- Flix (video feed): https://flixtrend.in/flix
- Watch: https://flixtrend.in/watch
- Search: https://flixtrend.in/search
- Individual post: https://flixtrend.in/post/{postId}
- Embeddable post player: https://flixtrend.in/embed/{postId}

### Flow — Live Streaming
- Flow home: https://flixtrend.in/flow
- Live stream room: https://flixtrend.in/flow/{videoId}
- Live room (broadcast): https://flixtrend.in/live/{roomName}
- Broadcast room: https://flixtrend.in/broadcast/{roomName}

### Music
- Music home: https://flixtrend.in/music
- Individual song: https://flixtrend.in/music/{songId}

### Squads — Creator Communities
- Squad explore: https://flixtrend.in/squad/explore
- Squad home: https://flixtrend.in/squad
- Creator profile: https://flixtrend.in/squad/{username}

### Signal — Messaging
- Signal inbox: https://flixtrend.in/signal
- Individual chat: https://flixtrend.in/signal/{id}
- Create group chat: https://flixtrend.in/signal/create-group

### Drops
- Drops feed: https://flixtrend.in/drop
- Create a drop: https://flixtrend.in/drop/create

### Creator Tools
- Create post: https://flixtrend.in/create
- Studio (creator dashboard): https://flixtrend.in/studio
- Store: https://flixtrend.in/store
- Premium: https://flixtrend.in/premium

### Settings
- Settings home: https://flixtrend.in/settings
- Additional settings: https://flixtrend.in/settings/additional
- Archived chats: https://flixtrend.in/settings/archived-chats

---

## Dynamic URL Patterns

| Pattern | Description |
|---|---|
| `/squad/{username}` | Public creator profile page |
| `/post/{postId}` | Individual post/flash page |
| `/embed/{postId}` | Embeddable post player (for external use) |
| `/flow/{videoId}` | Live or recorded stream page |
| `/live/{roomName}` | Live room viewer |
| `/broadcast/{roomName}` | Broadcaster room |
| `/music/{songId}` | Individual song/track page |
| `/signal/{id}` | Individual Signal chat thread |
| `/help/{category}` | Help center category |
| `/help/{category}/{slug}` | Individual help article |

---

## User Types

- **Creators** — verified content creators with public profiles at `/squad/{username}`, access to Studio, Drops, Flow, and monetization
- **Singers / Artists** — special creator subtype with dedicated onboarding (`/signup/singer`) and terms (`/terms/singer`)
- **General Users** — follow creators, engage with content, use Signal, access Vibespace
- **Guest** — limited browsing without an account via `/guest`
- **Admin** — internal platform moderation at `/admin` (not public)

---

## Technical Notes for AI Crawlers

- Built with Next.js (App Router) and Firebase/Firestore
- Sitemap auto-generated with 24h revalidation (`revalidate = 86400`) — do not cache indefinitely
- Posts use opt-out moderation: content is public unless `isDeleted`, `isBanned`, or `isDraft === true`
- Posts without a `visibility` field are treated as public (Firestore opt-out pattern)
- Creators are identified by `accountType === 'creator'` in Firestore
- Age-aware sitemap priorities: posts < 30 days → 0.9, < 1 year → 0.7, older → 0.4
- Creator activity priority: active within 6 months → 0.8, inactive → 0.5
- Static priority: homepage → 1.0, /about /faq /help /contact → 0.9
- Paginated sitemap index planned when approaching ~45k URLs (Next.js `generateSitemaps()`)
- All squad usernames are `encodeURIComponent`'d and lowercased in sitemap

---

- Twitter/X: @FlxTrnd
- Contact page: https://flixtrend.in/contact
